title: Create CROWNS: Reindustrialized (a.k.a. CROWNS x TFMG)
description: Makes CROWNS's assets look more industrialized.
body:
### Resource pack that makes CROWNS mod have metallic-industrial textures.

---
⚠ This RP was made for the purpose of using it with TFMG, it's not dependent on TFMG mod, although it's highly recommended for use with TFMG mod installed for matching textures.

---
![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5a4fdd46f4f3222617b45f9e6371fe561acb85d.png)

![Blocks Part 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61a15bb2782b9d8a95f98c35af9bcdf5bbe3dcc5.png)

![Turbine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/451e24394e02d6583f837d0307d2c6afe9ee8db9.png)

---
### Credits:
- TFMG Team - Textures and colors (like really, thx so much).
- CROWNS Team - Raw models and CROWNS itself.

---
### Additional Info:
Most of textures that are used were originated OR are from TFMG (to be more specific from 1.1.0c-1.21.1 version).
